contract.fixed_work: same hash-bound manifest files at every timeout and repetition
contract.timing_policy: Axeyum/Z3 paired ratios use only queries both decided in every repetition at a timeout; cvc5 subprocess wall time is not divided into that ratio
contract.unknown_policy: Unknown is a reported nondecision, never agreement or error
contract.verdict_gate: all decided outcomes must match the manifest; SAT/UNSAT contradiction across any solver, timeout, or repetition fails

manifest.name: glaurung-tcpip-shadow-splits-post-concat-fix-v1
manifest.source: Glaurung d60ed0f; Axeyum 4b81e4de; combined shadow, source-prefix direct lineage, 60 seconds per function; declared concat widths enforced; expected is the only backend-decided class

solver.process_boundary: fresh cvc5 process per exact SMT-LIB file
solver.timing_boundary: wall time includes process startup, SMT-LIB parsing, solving, and model output

manifest.membership: exact: every .smt2 file under the corpus root is manifested
manifest.name: glaurung-tcpip-shadow-splits-post-concat-fix-v1

fixed_both_decided.query_boundary: original parsed assertions for both in-process solvers
fixed_both_decided.selection: queries both decided in every repetition at this timeout

fixed_work_all_query_total_ms.interpretation: descriptive fixed-work totals including timeout and nondecision costs; never a solved-only speed ratio
